candidates.why: Candidate is a cost line, not top-line revenue.
Operating expense line, not revenue.
Expense component, not revenue.
Amortization expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of right of use of assets included in sales and distribution costs
candidates.why: Depreciation expense, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line profit measure, not revenue.
Bottom-line profit measure, not revenue.
Profit metric, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the correct top-line label. Selected 'Net revenue' directly from the Income Statement preview. The label appears twice in the preview, but final_choice cannot repeat the same row_label, so only one instance is listed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net revenue

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line and the most specific COGS label.
Also represents COGS, but it is a total and duplicates 'Cost of goods sold'. Prefer the more specific non-total label.

variables.notes: Chose the specific COGS row over the duplicate total.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but only one subcomponent of selling costs.
Clear overhead bucket and good SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A row, but appears populated only in 2025.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A subcomponent, but only one part of SG&A.
Valid SG&A subcomponent, but partial.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Used one row outside the candidate list: 'Sales and Distribution Costs'. Candidate list appears to miss this major overhead bucket. I did not include 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' together with these rows because that would likely double count 2025, where the explicit SG&A row coexists with detailed selling/admin lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and Distribution Costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; also supplemental and below operating profit section.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is present on the Income Statement. The only R&D-related row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as XRD expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total, but less preferred than granular recurring interest components.
Direct interest expense line and preferred component.
Recurring lease-related interest component; include with other interest expense if separate.
May include recurring finance costs, but label is generic and appears only sparsely; less certain.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure duplicative of lease interest line in the main statement.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over the broader 'Financial costs' total to avoid including FX/derivative/other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not equity.
Income statement attribution row, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best owner-only equity measure; excludes non-controlling interests if any.
Acceptable fallback, but less preferred because it could include NCI.
Shareholder count, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Priority list uses owner-only equity first; 'Total Equity' is included as fallback if the owner-only line is unavailable in some periods.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is present on the Balance Sheet preview.
